ideation: This animation sequence mimics the act of writing or typing on a keyboard.  The robot will appear focused and engaged in a task.  The sequence will primarily use the right arm, with the left arm remaining relatively static for balance.  The right arm will move in a controlled, repetitive motion, suggesting the rhythmic act of typing.  I will use small wrist adjustments to add a sense of finesse and precision to the motion.  The frames will showcase the beginning, middle, and end of a single 'typing' stroke, then a return to the resting position.

frames.beat: arms rest, ready for the task
right hand reaches forward, poised to strike
hand returns, ready for the next keystroke
